reviews.name: 까미깜
reviews.content:
🧡개사원 솔직리뷰🧡
안녕하세요! 반짝반짝 새까만 털에 귀여운 양말로 포인트를 준 까미입니다! 밤에 산책하면 제 의도치 않은 은둔술 때문에 이렇게 귀엽고 소중한 저를 보고 놀라는 사람들이나 친구들이 간혹 있더라구요. 난 정말 귀여울 뿐인데... 까만 친구들이라면 정말 공감할듯... 무튼 이런 저를 위해 언니가 신상 블링커를 달아줬어요! 말랑말랑 귀여운게 제 목에 딱 붙어있어서 거슬리지도 않고 귀여운 핑크빔으로 제 뽀짝함이 대폭 증가! 밤산책을 즐기는 친구들이라면 저 까미가 강추해요!💖
reviews.content_en:
🧡Honest Pet Employee Review🧡
Hello! I'm Kami, a shiny black pup with cute little socks for a cute touch! 😄 When I go for night walks, sometimes people and friends get startled by my unintentionally sneaky appearance—they see me and go "Oh wow!" Even though I'm just really cute and precious... I bet all my black-furred friends can relate... Anyway, my sister got me a new blinker light! 💖 It's so soft and adorable, sitting perfectly on my neck without bothering me at all, and with this cute pink glow, my sparkle factor has increased tremendously! If you have a friend who loves night walks, I, Kami, highly recommend this! 💖

reviews.name: 채****
reviews.content: 털썩 엎어져서 땅에 비비는 걸 좋아하는 강아지라 ㅋ ㅋ 비비다가 망가트릴까봐 걱정했는데 세 번의 비빔을 견뎌냈네요 ㅠ.ㅠ 대견한 젤리곰아… 생각보다 튼튼한 것 같아요! 시판되는 야간산책 LED 중에 제일 귀엽다고 생각합니다…^.^b
reviews.content_en: My pup loves to flop down and rub herself all over the ground lol, so I was worried she'd destroy it during her rolling sessions... but it survived three rounds of rubbing! 😭 I'm so proud of you, jelly bear... It seems way more durable than I expected! I think it's the cutest LED light for night walks available on the market...^.^b

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content:
말랑한 재질이라 버튼 누르기도 좋고, 불 밝고 귀여워요. 리드줄에 감는 것도 편해요.
비오는 날 우비하고도 찰떡이네요.
reviews.content_en: The soft material makes it easy to press the button, and the light is bright and cute. It's also convenient to wrap around the leash. It pairs perfectly with a raincoat on rainy days too!

reviews.name: 방****
reviews.content:
불 켰을 때가 훨씬 귀엽네요!!
말랑말랑하고 가벼워서 하네스나 리드줄 어디에나 착용이 쉬울 것 같고, 충전방식인 점도 마음에 들어요!
reviews.content_en: It's way cuter when the light is on!! The soft and lightweight material makes it easy to attach anywhere—on a harness or leash—and I love that it's rechargeable!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
일단 너무 귀여워요! 가볍고 말랑말랑해서 강아지가 별로 불편함을 느끼지 않는거 같고 탈부착도 쉬워서 하네스나 줄에 쉽게 사용할 수 있어요. 충전도 씨타입이라 건전지 따로 사용하지 않는게 장점이에요. 주변에 추천하고 다니는 중입니다!

저녁에 강아지 보고 놀라는 사람들이 없어서 더 편해요. 멀리서도 잘보여요. 색도 세가지라 마음에 드는거 고를 수 있고 무척무척 맘에 든 아이템 입니다🙌🏼🙌🏼
reviews.content_en: First of all, it's so cute! It's lightweight and soft so my pup doesn't seem uncomfortable at all, and it's easy to attach and detach so I can use it on a harness or leash without any hassle. Plus, the USB-C charging is great since I don't need to buy separate batteries. I'm recommending it to everyone around me! I'm also happy that people aren't startled when they see my pup at night anymore—it's easier that way. You can see it clearly from far away too. There are three color options so you can pick your favorite, and it's definitely an item I'm very happy with 🙌🏼🙌🏼

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
예전부터 갖고 싶었는데 이번에 세일 할때 샀어요
어두운 밤에 안 보일까봐 걱정됐는데 이렇게 꽂고 다니면 환해서 사람들이나 차가 못볼 수 없는 것 같아요
다만 여름에는 벌레가 꼬일가봐 쪼금 무섭긴 하네요 ㅎㅎ
일단 겨울에 밤이 어둡고 기니까 사용해보려구요!
넘나 깜찍하고 마음에 듭니다
가벼워서 더 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I'd been wanting this for a while and finally got it when it was on sale this time. I was worried it wouldn't be visible on dark nights, but with this on, it's so bright that people and cars definitely can't miss us. Though I am a bit worried about bugs being attracted to it in the summer lol. Anyway, I'm planning to use it since winter nights are so dark and long! It's super adorable and I love it. Plus it's lightweight, which is even better!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
까만강아지라 밤산책에 잘안보이거든여
양쪽에 하나씩 다니까 눈에 잘보여서 너무 좋아요
reviews.content_en: Since I have a black dog, she's hard to see on night walks. Having one on each side makes her so visible and it's amazing!

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
아웅 너무 만족스러워요ㅋㅋ
사회인이라 밤산책을 해야할수밖에 없는 상황인데
이렇게 반짝반짝 나 여깄어요 해주니 안심입니다ㅎ
무엇보다 충전해서 사용가능하니 더 만족이에요ㅋ
reviews.content_en: I'm seriously so satisfied lol. As a working person, I have no choice but to take night walks, so having it shine like "Hey, I'm here!" puts my mind at ease 😊 And on top of that, the fact that it's rechargeable makes me even happier lol!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
저희 가나디는 실푸인데 밤에 공원가면 잘 안보여요
다른 led는 건전지가 빨리 달거나, 안밝거나, 일회용처럼 쓰면 갈수가없거나 였는데 충전식이라 너무너무 좋아요!
근데 거기에다가 귀엽고 컬러 예쁘기까지 led 곰돌이 폼 굳ㅎㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My Gana is a Shih Poo and it's hard to see her at night when we go to the park. Other LEDs either run out of batteries quickly, aren't bright enough, or can't be replaced if used disposably... but since this one is rechargeable, I love it so much! And on top of that, it's cute with pretty colors too—this jelly bear LED is a total win lol!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 쓰고 있던게 고장나서 검색해보다가 젤리곰 넘 귀엽길래 구매 했어요. 디자인도 귀엽고~건전지가 아니고 충전되는게 넘나 맘에 들어요.
reviews.content_en: My old one broke so I searched for a replacement and discovered the jelly bear was so adorable I just had to buy it. The design is cute~ and I absolutely love that it's rechargeable instead of requiring batteries!

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
딱 필요하던 찰나에 1+1구매로 할 수 있어 좋아요
분홍색도 갖고 있지만 어머니가 노랑색을 너무 탐내하셔셔
구매했습니다.

가볍고 충전잘 되고
라이트도 상당히 밝고
디자인도 귀엽고
먼족스러워요
reviews.content_en: I'm so glad I could get the 1+1 deal when I really needed it. I already have the pink one, but my mom really wanted the yellow color, so I bought it for her. It's lightweight, charges well, the light is quite bright, the design is cute, and I'm very satisfied!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 예뻐요ㆍ2개 잃어버리고 노란색이랑 핑크 다시 구매했는데 색깔이 너무 예뻐요ㆍ덩치가 큰데 불빛이 러블리 하네요
reviews.content_en: It's so pretty. I lost 2 of them and bought the yellow and pink ones again, and the colors are just so pretty. Even though it's bulky, the light is so lovely.

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
받자마자 켜보니 노란색이 예쁘더라구요. 일부러 해지고 밤산책을 가면서 보니까 밝은데서 본거의 100배는 훨씬 예쁩니다.
멀리서도 잘 보이고 어두운데서도 잘 보일테니 안전도 확보하고
예쁨도 확보하고 남들 시선도 확보. . . ㅋ
너무 잘 산거 같아요. c타입 충전이라 너무 편하고 와따예요
reviews.content_en: As soon as I got it, I turned it on and the yellow color was so pretty. I used it during an evening walk on purpose, and it's 100 times prettier than how it looked in bright daylight. It's visible from far away and will definitely be visible even in the dark, so safety is covered and it looks great and turns heads too... ㅋ I think I got a really great deal. The USB-C charging is so convenient and I'm really happy with it!

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content: 부드러운 실리콘재질인데 벨트에 착 감겨서 부착가능하네요ㅎ 불도 제법 밝고 충전식이라 너무 마음에 듭니다
reviews.content_en: It's made of soft silicone material and wraps around the belt so it can attach easily. The light is quite bright and since it's rechargeable, I'm really happy with it.

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content: 진짜 세상 너무 귀여워요ㅜㅜㅜ 평소 쓰던거는 배터리 방식인데 뚜껑이 너무 뻑뻑해서 배터리 교체 못하고 새로 사줬는데 이건 충전식에다가 귀여워서 바로 구매했어요 불도 되게 밝고 실물이 훨씬 더더 귀여워요 무조건 재구매각!!
reviews.content_en: It's seriously the cutest thing ever ㅜㅜㅜ The one I used before was battery-operated and the cap was so stiff that I couldn't change the batteries, so I had to buy a new one. But this one is rechargeable AND cute, so I bought it right away. The light is really bright and the actual product is SO much cuter than in the photos. Definitely will repurchase!!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
직장에 다녀서 밤에 산책을 자주 시키는편이예요
불안한맘에 젤리곰을 구매했는데 눈에 확 띄고 넘 귀여워요^^
데리고 나가니 다 귀엽다고 입을 대네요
reviews.content_en: I work during the day so I usually take my dog for evening walks. I was worried, so I bought the jelly bear light, and it really stands out and is so cute ^^ When I take it out, everyone says how adorable it is!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 친구 강아지 밤 산책할때 사용하라고 줬는데 진짜 밝데요 멀리서 봐도 여기 저 있어요! 알려줄수 있다고 합니다 좋은 상품 항상 만들어주셔서 감사합니다!
reviews.content_en: I gave it to my friend to use for her dog's night walks and it's really bright! You can see it from far away and point out where the dog is! Thank you for always making great products!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 불 켜지니 곰돌이가 웃고 있어여..커엽.. 임시로 가슴 쪽에 달아보았는데 딱 맞게 고정되는 거 보니 권장 사이즈에 적합하기만 하면 어디에 달아도 고정력은 좋을 거 같아요~! 불빛도 세 가지 모드 다 삐까뻔쩍 하네요ㅎㅎ 충전식이라 배터리 교체 걱정 없어 좋슴다! 바나나 곰돌이가 젤 눈에 띄었는데 다른 색상도 탐나네요..💛
reviews.content_en: When I turn the light on, the bear looks like it's smiling... so cute.. I temporarily attached it to the chest area and it holds in place perfectly, so as long as it fits the recommended size, it should hold securely wherever you attach it! The light has three modes and they're all super bright ㅎㅎ It's rechargeable so no need to worry about battery changes! The banana bear really caught my eye, but now I'm eyeing the other colors too.. 💛

reviews.name: 궁****
reviews.content: 강쥐들 주려고 딱 3마리라 3종세트 샀어요. 주위가 어두워서 실외배변 할때 손전등 들고 다녓는데 밝아서 강쥐 어디 있는지 찾기 쉽고 충전용이라 편해요. 하네스에 착용 했을때 엄청 가벼워서 불편해하지 않아 좋아요.
reviews.content_en: I have exactly 3 pups so I bought the 3-piece set for them. The area outside is dark so I used to carry a flashlight when they go potty outside, but it's so bright that it's easy to find where the pups are, and since it's rechargeable it's super convenient. It's incredibly lightweight when attached to the harness so they don't mind wearing it.

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 반려견이 작아서 밤늦게 산책하면 걱정이 좀 되는데 젤리곰 LED 구매하고 걱정 덜었네요. 다만 반려견 체구가 너무 작다보니 LED가 엄청 크게 느껴져 리드줄에 달고 사용해야 해요. 무겁진 않음.
reviews.content_en: My dog is small, so I was a bit worried about late-night walks, but after buying the jelly bear LED, I feel much better. However, since my dog is so small, the LED feels really big, so I have to attach it to the leash instead. It's not heavy though.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
이거 진짜 밝고 예쁘네요!
핑크 불빛이 정말 환해요~ 저녁 산책에도 든든하겠어오!!
reviews.content_en: This is really bright and pretty! 🎀 The pink light is so vivid~ It'll be so reliable for evening walks!!

reviews.name: 모****
reviews.content: 산책할때 밝은빛이 안전하거 지켜줘서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I love that the bright light keeps my pup safe during walks

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
너무귀엽네요
충전익이라 맘에들어요
불도밝고 좋습니다
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! 💕 I love that it's rechargeable. The light is bright and great!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
충전할수 있어서 너무 펀하고
넘 귀여워요 밝기도 엄정 밝아요
건전지 넣던제품사용하다가 젤리곰사용하니 넘좋아요
reviews.content_en: It's so fun because it's rechargeable! 🐶 It's so adorable and the brightness is seriously amazing. I used to use the battery-powered version, but Jelly Bear is so much better!

reviews.name: 노****
reviews.content: 맨날 싸구려로만 하다가 귀여운 젤리곰 나왔길래 셋트 주문했어요!!!! 충전식이라 배터리 걱정없고 알록달록 넘 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: I always went for cheap options, but when I saw the cute Jelly Bear came out, I ordered the set!!!! 🐻✨ Since it's rechargeable, I don't have to worry about batteries, and the colors are so cute and vibrant!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 충전식이라 좋고 밝아서 너무 좋아요 곰돌이도 귀여움 ㅠㅠ 색깔도 예뻐요
reviews.content_en: I love that it's rechargeable and so bright! 💡 The little bear is adorable too ㅠㅠ The colors are so pretty!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 너무 마음에 들어요 고리가 고무줄이라 끼우기도 싶고 벗겨질 걱정도 없을꺼 같아요
reviews.content_en: I absolutely love it! 🐾 The loop is made of rubber so it's easy to put on and I don't think it'll slip off either

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
조오올 귀탱 ㅜㅜ 똔봉투 홀더랑 같이 구매했는데 
넘나릐 잘어울리는것 ㅠ 
불빛도 반짝반짝 잘나오고 귀여워요 ㅠㅠㅠ

똥츄도 젤리곰모양으로 나왔으면 좋겠어요!!!
reviews.content_en: So incredibly cute ㅜㅜ I bought it together with the poop bag holder and they match so perfectly together ✨ ㅠ The light sparkles and shines so well and it's adorable ㅠㅠㅠ I wish the poop bag dispenser came in Jelly Bear shape too!!!

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content: 일단 귀여워요! 시중에 판매되는 블링커보다 약간 비싸지만 귀엽다면 ok입니다. 아기 강아지라 이빨이 날카로운데 씹어도 안 찢어져서 놀랐어요! 밝은 곳에서는 잘 보이려나~ 했지만 좀 어두워지면 등불 들고 다니는 것처럼 아주 밝게 빛나요!
reviews.content_en: It's cute! 💕 It's a bit pricier than the blinkers sold in stores, but if it's this cute, it's worth it. My puppy is still young and has sharp teeth, but I was shocked that it doesn't tear even when she chews on it! I wasn't sure if it would be bright enough in well-lit areas, but once it gets a bit darker, it shines so brightly like you're carrying a lantern!

reviews.name: 뉴****
reviews.content:
여름에는 밤산책을 자주 나가서 구매했는데 밝아서 누가봐듀 강아지 여기있어요~~🙌 하는느낌 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
충전도 너무 간편하게 좋고 가볍고 귀엽고 짱짱맨입니다 🩵
reviews.content_en: I bought it because we go on a lot of night walks in summer, and it's so bright that it really says 'hey, there's a puppy over here!' 🙌 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ Charging is super convenient, it's lightweight, cute, and absolutely amazing! 🩵

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 충전식이라는 점이 구매 이유였고 받아보니 사이즈도 적당하고 가볍고 불 밝기도 밝아 좋아요. 맘에 듭니다.
reviews.content_en: The fact that it's rechargeable is why I bought it, and once I got it, the size is just right, it's light, and the brightness is great. I'm really happy with it.

reviews.name: 키****
reviews.content: 라이트 살때마다 실패했어요. 뽑기운이 안 좋은건지, 비싼거 다 필요없어요. 이제껏 라이트 중에 젤 만족합니다. 불도 굉당히 환하고요
reviews.content_en: I've had bad luck with lights every time I bought one before. Maybe my luck with picks has been off, but honestly you don't need anything expensive. This is by far the most satisfied I've been with a light. The brightness is also incredible.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 무게도 적당하고 충전식이라 마음에 더 들어요
reviews.content_en: The weight is perfect and I love it even more because it's rechargeable.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
노랑, 핑크 두개 샀는데 노란색은 선물용으로 구매했어요:)
요즘 너무 더워서 해가 지고나서 산책을 나가는데 어두운 곳에서 갑자기 저희 강아지를 보고 놀라시는 분들도 계셔서 알아보다가 젤리곰 LED 보자마자 너무 귀여워서 바로 장바구니에 넣었어요! 가격대가 조금 있는 것 같아서 고민했는데 다른 상품과 다르게 충전식이고 평이 좋아서 구매했어요. 착용하고 나갔을 때 정말 밝아서 눈에 띄고 강아지도 불편해하지 않을정도로 가벼워서 너무 만족합니다! 충전도 금방되고 너무 좋아요:)
금방 고장나지 않고 오래 쓸 수 있으면 좋겠어요!!
reviews.content_en: I bought two—yellow and pink. The yellow one was for a gift 😊 It's been so hot lately that we've been taking walks after sunset, and there are people who suddenly notice our puppy in the dark and get startled. When I saw the Jelly Bear LED, it was so cute that I immediately added it to my cart! I was hesitant because of the price, but unlike other products, it's rechargeable and has great reviews, so I went for it. When we went out wearing it, it was really bright and stood out, and it's light enough that our puppy doesn't find it uncomfortable. I'm so satisfied! It charges quickly and I love it 😊 I hope it doesn't break easily and lasts a long time!!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
귀여운 젤리곰 디자인이 눈에 확 들어오는 제품으로, 산책할 때 포인트 아이템으로 딱이네요 그리고 실용성까지 너무 좋아요 
말랑한 실리콘 소재라 가볍고 안전하게 사용할 수 있고, 목줄이나 하네스에 쉽게 달 수 있어서 원하는 곳에 달면되니 활용성이 좋네요
LED가 선명하게 들어와서 밤이나 새벽 산책 시 시인성이 좋아 보호자와 강아지 모두 안심할 수 있는 것 같아요 강추합니다!!
다른색도 구매하고 싶네요 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: The cute jelly bear design really catches your eye—it's perfect as a statement piece for walks. And the practicality is amazing too! The soft silicone material is light and safe to use, and it attaches easily to the leash or harness so you can put it wherever you want. The LED lights up clearly, so visibility is great for evening or early morning walks, which gives peace of mind to both the owner and the dog. Highly recommended!! I want to buy other colors too. It's so cute!

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
ㅁㅊ 귀여움과 함께 실용성 + 편의성까지 대박!

100% 실외배변이기에 365일 날씨 상관없이 매일 산책 필수인데
우리집 상전 가을이께서는 집에서는 얌전하시지만...
밖에만 나갔다하면 풀 ㄸㄹㅇ 모드를 마구 발산하시고;
주로 밤에 나가기에 이런 제품 솔직히 여러개 있는데

곧 생일이라(나주 천사의집 사설보호소 입양일인 10/29 생일로!)
바잇미 옷 사면서 1+1 이벤트기까지 하니까 구매해본건데
와 이거 진짜 역대급으로 좋은데요?

가을이의 블링커 중에서 가장 독보적인 밝기!

목에 끼우는 그 무지개 빛 나오는 것도 있고
요것처럼 작은 동그란 모양 등등 여러가지 있는데
뭐가 됐든 이 바잇미 젤리곰 밝기가 최고!
작지만 진심 밝기 짱짱합니다!

거기에 불켜면 젤리곰 모양이 선명해져서 ㅁㅊ 귀여움까지!

C핀 충전이라 충전하기도 좋고

가벼워서 10.795kg인 가을이도 가을이지만
소형견 애들에게도 부담 없는 무게!

마구 뛰어다녀도 빠지지 않는 짱짱함!

한번 충전하면 오래 가기까지!

필수품으로 꼭 쟁이시길 강추!
reviews.content_en: Adorable design combined with practicality + convenience = game changer! Since we do 100% outdoor bathroom breaks, walks are essential 365 days a year regardless of weather. Our little queen, Gaeul, is well-behaved at home, but... once we're outside, she just goes into full crazy mode; We mainly go out at night, so honestly I have several of these products, but since her birthday's coming up (her adoption day at Naju Angel's House shelter on 10/29!), I bought her a BITE ME outfit during the 1+1 event and tried this out. Wow, this is seriously the best ever? Among Gaeul's blinkers, this has the most standout brightness! There are other options like the rainbow-colored ones you wear around the neck and small round ones, but no matter what, this BITE ME jelly bear light is the brightest! Small but genuinely super bright! Plus when you turn on the light, the jelly bear shape becomes so clear—it's impossibly cute! C-pin charging makes it easy to charge up. It's light, so even though Gaeul weighs 10.795kg, it's no burden for her or other small dogs! It doesn't fall off no matter how much she bounces around! It lasts a long time on a single charge! I highly recommend making this a must-have product!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 바잇미에서 첫구매하면서... 이건 그냥 겸사겸사 사보는 거라고 제 자신에게 되뇌였는데... 진심 신세계네요...ㅠㅠ 충전식 블링커 있으면 야간산책 때 좀 덜 위험할까싶어서 주문하면서... 배변봉투 홀더는 정말 그냥 혹시나 하는 마음에 산건데... 오자마자 바로 들고 산책나가봤는데 진심 편해요ㅠㅠㅠㅠ 배변봉투 홀더 괜히 산건 아니겠지? 했는데 쓰레기 버릴 곳이 가깝지 않을 때 바로 손이 자유로워져요ㅠㅠㅠ 안쓰던 분들도 속는 셈치고 꼭!!! 꼭 사보셨으면 좋겠습니다ㅠㅠㅠ 그리고 충전식 블링커가 C타입이라서 너무 너무 편해요ㅠㅠㅠ 2시간동안 산책 잘하고 들어왔어요! 강력추천합니다... 다른 색도 깔별로 다 사고싶어요ㅠㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: This is my first purchase from BITE ME, and I kept telling myself I was just buying this on a whim... but it's seriously a whole new world 😭 I ordered it hoping a rechargeable blinker would make night walks a bit safer, and honestly I just bought the poop bag holder on a whim, but as soon as I got it, I took it out for a walk and it's seriously so convenient 😭😭😭 I was like, 'did I really need to buy a poop bag holder?' but when there's no trash can nearby, it instantly frees up my hands 😭😭😭 Even if you've never used one before, I really, really hope you'll try it!!! And since the rechargeable blinker uses C-type charging, it's super convenient 😭😭😭 We had a great 2-hour walk and came back! Highly recommend... I want to buy all the different colors 😭😭😭

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
사람들이 5kg의 우리 아이가 반짝 반짝 반딧불이가 된 것 같다고 하네요ㅎㅎ 너무 마음에 들어요! 어두운 아파트 단지의 대왕 반딧불이가 되고 있습니다 캬캬 미니미한 사이즈인데 불빛이 장난아니에여!! 손쉬운 충전 방식가지!! 
냄시나는 끙아 봉투도 손에 안들도 손쉽게 꼽고 다닐 수 있는데, 세트로 착한 가격에 데려올 수 있어서 100% 만족 입니다! 꼭 구매하세요!
reviews.content_en: People say our 5kg baby looks like a twinkling firefly 🤭 I'm so happy with it! She's becoming the big firefly of our dark apartment complex haha The size is mini but the light is no joke!! And the charging is so easy! The poop bag holder fits easily in your hand without it hanging around, and I could get the whole set at a great price, so I'm 100% satisfied! Definitely buy it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
너무너무 귀엽습니다!!
달랑 거리는 불빛 라이트를 썼는데 강아지가 걷고 뛸 때마다 몸애 부딪히고 부딪히는 소리도 거슬렸는데 고무로 고정되어 있어서 신경 쓰이지 않습니다>.<
디자인도 색깔도 마음에 들어요!
남자 강아지여서 노랑으로 주문했는데 너무 만족!!
충전식이어서 배터리 교환 걱정없고 고무 재질도 좋네요
하네스에 딱 붙어 있어서 귀여워요
reviews.content_en:
It's so so cute!! I used to use those swinging light lights, and whenever my dog walked or ran, it would bang against her body and the noise bothered me, but since it's fixed with rubber, I don't have to worry about it anymore >.<
I love the design and colors! Since I have a boy, I ordered it in yellow and I'm so happy!! Since it's rechargeable, I don't have to worry about changing batteries, and the rubber material is great too. It's so cute how it sticks right on the harness!

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 일단 디자인이 너무 귀여워요..🩷 컬러가 다 귀여워서 뭘로 할까 고민하다가 사진설명 보니까 핑크색이 제일 밝을 것 같아서 핑크로 샀어요! 밝기도 정말 밝고 굉장히 가벼워서 2.7키로인 우리 애기한테도 부담이 안될 것 같아요. 사실 제품에 흠집이 있는게 왔는데 어차피 소모품이기도 하고 너무 귀여워서 얼른 쓰고싶어서 교환 안 하고 그냥 씁니다🫢 다음부터는 검수 잘 부탁드려요!
reviews.content_en: First of all, the design is so cute 🩷 All the colors are adorable so I was having trouble deciding, but when I looked at the product description, the pink seemed like it would be the brightest, so I went with pink! The brightness is really bright and it's very light, so even our 2.7kg baby shouldn't find it burdensome. Actually, the product arrived with a scratch on it, but since it's kind of a consumable anyway and I'm so excited to use it, I'm just using it without exchanging it 🫢 Please do better quality checks next time!

reviews.name: m****
reviews.content: 블링커 여러 브랜드 고민하다 구입하지 못하고 있었어요 디자인 조명밝기 편의성 안전성 등등 몸에 바로 닿아야 하는 제품이라 고민이 많이 되더라구요 그러던 찰나에 바잇미 웰컴딜에서 보게 되었는데 너무너무 귀엽고 실리콘 재질이라 불편하지 않을것 같았어요 함께 구입한 그린컬러 크레용 하네스와 잘 어울릴거 같아 바나나로 구입했어요 밤에 찍은 사진이 없어서 아쉽지만 은은하면서도 적당히 밝아요 넘 맘에 들어요!
reviews.content_en: I was thinking about getting a blinker from several brands but couldn't decide to buy one. I had a lot of concerns about the design, brightness, convenience, safety, etc. since it's a product that touches your pet's body directly. Then I saw it on BITE ME's welcome deal, and it was SO cute! The silicone material seemed like it wouldn't be uncomfortable at all. I thought it would go well with the green Crayon harness I bought together, so I got the Banana one. It's a shame I didn't take a photo at night, but it's softly bright with just the right amount of light. I'm so happy with it!

reviews.name: 고****
reviews.content: 진짜 잘산템이예요!! 웁스클립은 생각보다 사이즈가 꽤 커서 부담스럽지 않을까 싶었는데, 워낙 가벼워서 리드줄에 달아도 부담없고 무엇보다 이렇게 손이 편한 아이템인 줄 알았다면 진작 살껄 싶었습니다! 블링커도 환하고 무겁지 않어서 좋고, 무엇보다 충전식인게 정말 좋습니다 :)
reviews.content_en: This is such a great purchase!! I was worried the OOPS clip might be too big and cumbersome, but it's so lightweight that it doesn't feel heavy even on the leash, and honestly I wish I'd known earlier how convenient this product is! The blinker is also bright and not heavy, and best of all, it's rechargeable :)

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
사실 LED 블링커 살 생각은 없었는데 디자인이 귀여워서 비싸도 지갑 탈탈털어 구매했어요. 딱 제품에 대해 간력하게 장단점만 적어볼게요.

장점
1. 충전식 ( 건전지를 구매해서 갈아끼워야 하는 불편함과 번거로움이 없음.)
2.점멸모드 ( 불빛 방식은 3가지 방식. 그런데 타제품도 이런 기능이 있을 것으로 예상. )

단점
1. 충전식 ( 충전식이라 그런지 배터리가 금방 방전됨. 완충했는데 1시간도 안되어서 방전.. )
2. 리드줄에 걸면 안보임 ( 리드줄은 계속 돌아가다보니 무게가 있어서 아래쪽으로 불빛이 비춰져서 리드줄에는 못 검 )
reviews.content_en:
Honestly, I wasn't planning to buy an LED blinker, but the design was so cute that I emptied my wallet and bought it anyway. Let me just briefly list the pros and cons of the product.

Pros
1. Rechargeable (no hassle of buying and replacing batteries)
2. Flashing mode (3 different light modes; other products probably have this feature too)

Cons
1. Rechargeable (because it's rechargeable, the battery drains quickly. It died in less than an hour even after full charge..)
2. Not visible on the leash (the leash keeps rotating, and since it has weight, the light shines downward so it's not visible on the leash)

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
생각보다 밝고 비추는 범위도 넓은 것 같아요!
C타입으로 충전할 수 있는 것도 너무 편하고 좋네요❤️ 단점은 얼마나 충전해야 완충인지.알 수 없고 배터리가 없어도 처음엔 빛이 들어와서 되는구나 핬다가 산책 중에 이게 왜 꺼졌지? 하고 삶작쿵 당황하게 된다는 점이랄까요ㅎㅎ
그래도 이 가격에 이렇게 귀여운 충전식 블링커를 가지게 돼서 너무 좋습니다🤗
reviews.content_en:
It's brighter than I expected and the light range seems pretty wide too!
It's also so convenient and great that you can charge it with a USB-C cable ❤️ The downside is that you can't tell when it's fully charged, and at first it lights up even without the battery indicator, so I thought it was working, but then during a walk I was like 'why did this turn off?' and got startled ㅎㅎ
Still, I'm so happy to have such a cute rechargeable blinker at this price 🤗

reviews.name: 원****
reviews.content:
저희 집 강쥐는 갈색 강아지라 밤산책때 정말 잘 안보이는데요 ㅠㅠㅋㅋ
블링커는 필수!
다른 브랜드 사용하던 블링커 있었는데 바잇미 제품이 귀여워보여서
3개 세트로 주문했어요
배송 받자마자 너무 만족! ㅎㅎ 귀엽고 불빛도 쨍하게 잘 나고
3가지 모드가 있어서 원하는대로 켜줄 수 있어서 좋더라구요
밤산책할때 강아지 있는거 모르다가 다른 사람들이 깜짝 놀랄 일도 없고 
저도 강아지가 어디 있는지 잘 보여서 좋고 만족스럽습니당!
reviews.content_en:
My brown pup is really hard to see during night walks ㅠㅠㅋㅋ
A blinker is essential!
I used to use a blinker from another brand, but the BITE ME product looked so cute that I ordered a set of 3.
I was so satisfied as soon as I received it! ㅎㅎ It's adorable, the light is bright and clear, and with 3 different modes, I can turn it on the way I want. People don't get startled not knowing my dog is there during night walks, I can see where my pup is clearly, and I'm very satisfied!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
ㅜㅜ너무너무잘쓰고있었는데요,,, 
제가방심햇나바요,,, 뭘잘근잘근씹고잇길래봣더니.,,ㅜㅜ
얼마쓰지도않앗는데 너무속상해오ㅠㅠㅠ

충전식이라너무좋고,, 귀엽고 밤에산책할때너무좋네용!
그리고 똥봉투걸수있는것두 항상가방에넣고다니면 냄새가베엇는데,, 그럴일이없어서 넘좋아요~~~!! 귀요운것까지 덤!!

저희강아지가,, 물어뜯어버려서ㅜㅜㅜㅜ다시사야할까봐요ㅜㅜㅜ넘속상하네융ㅠ
reviews.content_en:
I was using it so well ㅜㅜ but I got careless... I saw my pup chewing on something, and when I looked closer, she was chewing on it ㅜㅜ
I hadn't even used it that long and I'm so upset ㅠㅠㅠ

I love that it's rechargeable, it's adorable and so great for night walks!
And you can attach a poop bag holder, so I don't have to keep it in my bag anymore where it gets smelly... it's so nice not having that problem!!! Plus it's super cute!

My pup chewed it up ㅜㅜㅜㅜ so I might have to buy another one ㅜㅜㅜ I'm so upset ㅠ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 오늘 개시했는데 세상에 엄청 엄청 밝아요! 조금 어두운데 가면 요 블링커 빛으로 주변이 밝게보여요ㅋㅋㅋㅋ이전에 쓰던 다른 제품들에 비하면 빛도 밝고 내구성이 좋아보여서 너무 맘에 들어요! 밝은 곳에 가서 불 끄면 필요가 없냐 아니죠 걍 흰 곰돌이가 노랑 곰돌이 업고 다니는거에여 넘 귀여움ㅜㅜ.. 바잇미 좋은 재품 많이 많이 만들어주세용💛
reviews.content_en: I opened it today and wow, it's SUPER bright! When I go to a slightly dark area, the light from this blinker makes everything around it light up ㅋㅋㅋㅋ Compared to other products I used before, the light is brighter and the durability looks really good, so I love it so much! When you go to a bright place and turn off the light, you might think it's not needed, but nope, it's just a white bear cub riding on a yellow bear cub, it's SO cute ㅜㅜ Please make many more great products, BITE ME 💛

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
재수정해요! 
작동 안되는 후기를 남겼더니 고객센터에서 전화가 왔어요~고속충전기로 충전하면 잘 안될수도 있다고 안내해주셔서 일반충전기로 했더니 돌아왔어요~~ 잘 써볼게요 연락주셔서  감사합니다


리뷰수정합니다. 이거 대체 충전 시간이랑 사용 시간이 어떻게 되나요??? 하루종일 충전해도 10분? 사용하면 꺼져요. 아무리 충전식이라도 뭐 한번 산책에도 못쓰는걸 충전해서 뭐하겠어요 ...괜히샀네

-----------받자마자 하루만 멀쩡히 사용햇습니다.
일단 사이즈가 작지않아서 있는듯없는듯 하지않아 좋아요~  눈부시지 않고 은은한데 존재감 뿜뿜! 충전식이라 영구적으로 사용할수있는게 진짜 최고의 장점이네요
reviews.content_en:
Updating my review!
I left a review saying it wasn't working, and the customer center called me~ They advised that it might not work well if charged with a fast charger, so I tried a regular charger and it works now~~ I'll use it well. Thank you for contacting me.


Updating review: What exactly are the charging time and usage time??? Even if I charge it all day, it only works for 10 minutes before turning off. No matter how rechargeable it is, what's the point of charging something that won't even work for one walk...

---------It worked fine for just one day after I got it.
First of all, the size isn't small, so it's nice that it has a presence without being intrusive~ It's not dazzling but has a subtle glow with great presence! Since it's rechargeable, you can use it permanently, which is really the best advantage

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 평소에 산책을 자주 다니고 거의 대부분 댕댕이 데리고 다니는 편이다보니 저녁에도 자주 돌아다니는데요, 기존에 쓰던거는 뺐다 끼웠다 하기 너무 귀찮더라구요ㅠ ㅠ 그렇다고 계속 하네스에 매달고 다니자니 무게감도 좀 있는 편이라 하네스가 계속 삐뚤어지고.. 마땅한게 없을까 하다가 요거 보고 꽂혀서 바잇미에서 이것 저것 같이 구매했어요 ㅋㅋ 일단 불이 진짜 밝아요 :) 실리콘 재질이라 부드럽구요. 그리고 하네스에 달랑달랑 하게 끼워서 쓰는 제품이 아니라서 좋아요! 그리고 다른 제품들 구매했더니 키링이 같이와서 키링에 꽂아두니까 낮엔 빼서 저렇게 보관하고 밤엔 빼서 쓸 수 있어서 잊어버리고 다닐 위험이 없어서 좋아요 :) 그리고 넘 궈여워용 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I go on walks pretty often and almost always take my pup with me, so I'm out in the evenings a lot. The one I used before was such a hassle to take on and off ㅠ ㅠ But if I just keep it on the harness, it's a bit heavy and the harness kept getting crooked... I couldn't find anything suitable until I saw this and got hooked. I bought a bunch of stuff from BITE ME ㅋㅋ First of all, the light is really bright :) The silicone material is soft. And it's great that it's not a product you clip on and off the harness! And when I bought other products, they came with a keyring, so I can store it on the keyring during the day and take it out to use at night, so there's no risk of forgetting it! And it's SO cute ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 젤리곰 모양도 귀여운데 불빛도 야무지게 밝아서 댕댕이 밤산책길을 안전하게 비춰주네욥🤩 충전식이라 오래 쓸 수 있고 넘 좋아요오 실리콘 재질이라 가벼운것도 넘 맘에 들어용👍
reviews.content_en: The jelly bear shape is adorable, and the light is bright enough to safely light up my pup's night walks 🤩 Since it's rechargeable, I can use it for a long time and I love it so much! I also love that the silicone material makes it lightweight 👍
